scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Employee
scopes.description: Employee: create and manage own leave requests

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.HRAdmin
scopes.description: HR Admin: full access, balance allocation

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.WorkflowCallback
scopes.description: SBPA workflow callback: approve/reject leave from workflow engine

role-collections.name: HR_Employee
role-collections.description: Assigned to all employees who submit leave requests

role-collections.name: HR_Manager
role-collections.description: Assigned to managers who approve leave requests

role-collections.name: SBPA_WorkflowCallback
role-collections.description: Assigned to the SBPA service instance principal for workflow callbacks
